texto: You're screwed when you start to notice the details,It's when you begin to notice the curve of his lips when he smiles.It's when you can't help but stare at him and the way he talks.It's when you get to admire the shape of his eyes and even the length of his brow.And even crazier, when you get to see the flash of his face in your mind on a random day or it's when you have his favorite facial expression stuck in your memory. . . And worse when you start to have it all in your mind, then you start to miss him.
explicacao: Citação de Ira Barin sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “You're screwed when you start to notice the details,It's when you begin to notice the curve of hi…” articula reflexao, falling-in-love, infatuation em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como infatuation e love-hurts.
